Infinite gold, infinite food, and infinite population recruitment.
Can pick a boy/prince to be General, even if you don't have any boys.
Ruler doesn't age (will never die from old age).
Boys/Princes can be appointed General at any age (even zero years old).
Girls/Princesses can be married at any age (even zero years old).
Infinite turns/body points (turn code off when your turn is over).
Get 1020 labor allocation points instead of 100 (in the Domest section).
Mercenaries are much cheaper to hire (about 93% off the usual price).
Can hire any units/troops when in the Hire Mercenaries section, no matter which nation you're playing.
Merchants are always available (in the Market).
Can select units/troops that you don't have (zero quantity) when forming legions (in the War/Attack section).
Start a new game with 10x as much gold ($3,690).
